title: jurinea carduiformis
intro: Jurinea carduiformis, also known as Jurinea or Spiny Thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. Consuming Jurinea carduiformis has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a dried extract, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
